check_adjustments.description: Verify LFSR shift and feedback relation: on each rising edge of clk after reset release, out_next must equal {out[2:0], ~ (out[3] ^ out[2])}.
Verify LFSR shift and feedback relation: on each rising edge of clk after reset release, out_next must equal {out[2:0], ~ (out[3] ^ out[2])}.
